A.title: Topic vocabulary (gap fill)
A.instructions: Complete the sentences with words from the box.

questions.sentence: The police officer asked me to show my ...... before entering the building.

He had to ...... that he had broken the window.
The town has a small ...... where teenagers meet after school.
She's ...... for organising the event this weekend.

B.title: Circle the correct word
B.instructions: Choose the correct option in each sentence.

questions.sentence: Stealing a bike is **illegal / social**.
The judge listened to both sides in **court / prison**.
It's not **typical / familiar** for him to be late.
People often **vote / rob** in local elections.
A **resident / criminal** is someone who lives in a place.
The government promised to protect local **culture / schedule**.

F.title: Word formation
F.instructions: Complete each sentence with the correct form of the word in capitals.

questions.sentence: The two teams finally reached an ...... after a long discussion. (AGREE)
